text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
No! I can't snack like this, it'll just make my bingo
wings heavier...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Oh, Ryan, I was just, uh... giving my arms a bit of
a pep talk. They're looking a little flabby lately.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Ah! That's good, though! Fat should be treasured!
It'll eventually become the energy for your
muscles!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Well, since we're here, do you wanna work out
together and test it out?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Ohh! I'd love to! Your workout routines must be
really effective!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Oh, but... um... please go easy on me!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Will do! Okay, first, let's see you do fifty pull-ups
on that pull-up bar!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
R-Ryan... My arms, my arms! They're... screaming
in pain!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Your muscles are crying in joy! Only five left!
Savor every last one! You're on your way to being
swole! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Thanks to Mejiro Ryan's workout method, Nice
Nature succeeds in losing some weight.
